/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared  -Wl,--no-undefined -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/ptcClient_lib.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,libptcClient_lib.so -o libptcClient_lib.so CMakeFiles/ptcClient_lib.dir/PtcClient/src/ptc_client.cc.o CMakeFiles/ptcClient_lib.dir/PtcClient/src/tcp_client.cc.o CMakeFiles/ptcClient_lib.dir/PtcParser/src/general_ptc_parser.cc.o CMakeFiles/ptcClient_lib.dir/PtcParser/src/ptc_1_0_parser.cc.o CMakeFiles/ptcClient_lib.dir/PtcParser/src/ptc_2_0_parser.cc.o CMakeFiles/ptcClient_lib.dir/PtcParser/ptc_parser.cc.o CMakeFiles/ptcClient_lib.dir/PtcClient/src/tcp_ssl_client.cc.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/kilabor/isaac-go2-ros2/build/hesai_ros_driver/src/driver/HesaiLidar_SDK_2.0/libhesai:/home/kilabor/miniconda3/envs/env_go2_real/lib: libplatutils_lib.so /home/kilabor/miniconda3/envs/env_go2_real/lib/libssl.so /home/kilabor/miniconda3/envs/env_go2_real/lib/libcrypto.so liblog_lib.so
